column1: # 8 MB flash layout — ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1 (N8R8/N16R8) node builds.
# The 4 MB table (partitions.csv) stays byte-identical for esp32dev/esp32cam
# fleet continuity — OTA cannot repartition. This table is S3-only:
#   app slots   3 MB each — headroom for TLS + the full sensor matrix
#   coredump    128 KB — S3 dumps (more RAM) overflow the 4 MB table's 64 KB
